paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.65 as of 2026-07-21, with an 8.66 percent increase from the prior close and a 25.86 percent decrease over the last 21 sessions. There has been one new news item in the last 24 hours.

Recent news includes an announcement from Fermi Inc. regarding its second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, which is scheduled for August 13, 2026, as reported by TradingView. The company has also filed several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K/A form disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson and a response letter from Everson.

There have been various other recent filings, including an 8-K form regarding the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031 and a SCHEDULE 13G filing. Additionally, there has been one new social post in the last 24 hours, with a user mentioning trimming their position in $FRMI at 6.80.
